code: import{getApiBaseUrl}from'../utils/apiBaseUrl';const TOKEN_KEY='clutch_token';export function getStoredToken(){return localStorage.getItem(TOKEN_KEY)||'';}export function setStoredToken(token){if(!token){localStorage.removeItem(TOKEN_KEY);return;}localStorage.setItem(TOKEN_KEY,token);}export async function apiRequest(path){let{method='GET',body,token,headers={}}=arguments.length>1&&arguments[1]!==undefined?arguments[1]:{};const authToken=token||getStoredToken();const res=await fetch(`${getApiBaseUrl()}${path}`,{method,headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json',...(authToken?{Authorization:`Bearer ${authToken}`}:{}),...headers},body:body===undefined?undefined:JSON.stringify(body)});const data=await res.json().catch(()=>({}));if(!res.ok){const err=new Error((data===null||data===void 0?void 0:data.error)||`Request failed (${res.status})`);err.status=res.status;throw err;}return data;}
